docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST AS TO DEFENDANT DOLLAR CROWN, INC., A CORPORATION D/B/A 7 MILE COIN LAUNDRY NDUPU, JOSEPH AN INDIVIDUAL NWANAKWERE, CHINYERE AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-03-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-29-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-18-2012

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-03-2012 CONTINUED TO NOV-14-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR FEB-05-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOV-14-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
